title: Tell It Another Way Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Related to a specific place or area near you.
rounds.answer: local
rounds.explanation: local: Related to a specific place or area near you.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: When a group enters a place and takes control, often by force.
rounds.answer: invasion
rounds.explanation: invasion: When a group enters a place and takes control, often by force.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: An amount that is more than what is needed.
rounds.answer: surplus
rounds.explanation: surplus: An amount that is more than what is needed.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Related to a city or town.
rounds.answer: urban

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: To win against something or take control of a place.
rounds.answer: conquer

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Not useful or realistic in a situation.
rounds.answer: impractical

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The local park is where we play every afternoon.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The colonial buildings in the city are very old.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The history book described the invasion of the coastal city.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Forgotten Mural, part 1': In the _____ town of Ayensu, nestled between clay hills and riverbanks, the Year 5 class of Nkrumah Primary was given...
rounds.answer: rural
rounds.explanation: The text says: In the rural town of Ayensu, nestled between clay hills and riverbanks, the Year 5 class of Nkrumah Primary was given an unusual task.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Forgotten Mural, part 1': It was loud and _____, the opposite of their quiet home village.
rounds.answer: spacious
rounds.explanation: The text says: It was loud and spacious, the opposite of their quiet home village.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Forgotten Mural, part 3': “It belongs to the whole _____.
rounds.answer: continent
rounds.explanation: The text says: “It belongs to the whole continent.

games.title: Reading Detective
games.description: Use unit evidence to solve each reading clue.

rounds.prompt: Uncle Adam mentions that the fishing boats returned empty for nine days. Does Amal mention this detail? Why do you think she does or does not include it?
choices: Accept an accurate complete-sentence response supported by a relevant detail from the selected text.
Related to a specific place or area near you.
Related to a city or town.
rounds.answer: Accept an accurate complete-sentence response supported by a relevant detail from the selected text.
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: Accept an accurate complete-sentence response supported by a relevant detail from the selected text.

rounds.prompt: Amal notices the orange cat trying to steal a fish. Why do you think Uncle Adam does not mention the cat in his version?
choices: Related to a specific place or area near you.
Related to a city or town.
Accept an accurate complete-sentence response supported by a relevant detail from the selected text.
rounds.answer: Accept an accurate complete-sentence response supported by a relevant detail from the selected text.
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: Accept an accurate complete-sentence response supported by a relevant detail from the selected text.

rounds.prompt: Read Amal's final sentences again. What do they tell us about how children experience the world differently from adults?
choices: Related to a city or town.
Accept an accurate complete-sentence response supported by a relevant detail from the selected text.
Related to a specific place or area near you.
rounds.answer: Accept an accurate complete-sentence response supported by a relevant detail from the selected text.
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: Accept an accurate complete-sentence response supported by a relevant detail from the selected text.

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 1: Hot-Seating (Character Interview)
rounds.target: In this activity, one person sits in the "hot seat" and pretends to be a character from the reading passage or from any story you have studied.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 3: Retelling Race
rounds.target: This is a fast, fun activity that practises your retelling skills under time pressure.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 5: Vocabulary Expert Interview
rounds.target: The history book described the invasion of the coastal city.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: I will contact my friend to ask about the homework.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: Write a synopsis of the fairy tale in three sentences.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The plaintive song made everyone feel quiet and thoughtful.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'cultural' mean in this unit?
choices: Related to the ideas, customs, and behaviour of a group of people.
Related to a specific place or area near you.
Related to the countryside, not the city.
rounds.answer: Related to the ideas, customs, and behaviour of a group of people.
rounds.explanation: cultural: Related to the ideas, customs, and behaviour of a group of people.

rounds.prompt: What does 'industrial' mean in this unit?
choices: Related to a specific place or area near you.
Related to the countryside, not the city.
Related to factories and making things.
rounds.answer: Related to factories and making things.
rounds.explanation: industrial: Related to factories and making things.

rounds.prompt: What does 'rural' mean in this unit?
choices: Related to a time when one country controlled another.
Related to the countryside, not the city.
Related to a specific place or area near you.
rounds.answer: Related to the countryside, not the city.
rounds.explanation: rural: Related to the countryside, not the city.

games.title: Word Type Power
games.description: Identify how each vocabulary word works in English.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'contact'?
rounds.answer: Noun
rounds.explanation: contact is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'plaintive'?
rounds.answer: Adjective
rounds.explanation: plaintive is used as a adjective in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'federal'?
rounds.answer: Adjective
rounds.explanation: federal is used as a adjective in this dictionary sense.

games.title: Memory Pairs
games.description: Reveal tiles and connect each word with its meaning.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 1.
pairs: Related to the countryside, not the city.
Related to a time when one country controlled another.
Related to government or how people make decisions about rules and laws.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 2.
pairs: Related to the ideas, customs, and behaviour of a group of people.
A picture or sign that represents something else.
A book where you write your thoughts, feelings, and daily activities.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 3.
pairs: Related to factories and making things.

games.title: Question Quest
games.description: Read each unit question carefully and choose the best answer.

rounds.prompt: What does 'spacious' mean?
choices: Having a lot of space; not crowded or small.
Related to a king or queen.
Related to a time when one country controlled another.
Related to events that happened in the past.
rounds.answer: Having a lot of space; not crowded or small.
rounds.explanation: The hall was spacious enough for the whole class.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Forgotten Mural, part 2': They titled it: “The Forgotten Mural: A Story of Symbols, Space, and Struggle.” Nadia began: “During the colonial era,...
rounds.answer: local
rounds.explanation: The text says: They titled it: “The Forgotten Mural: A Story of Symbols, Space, and Struggle.” Nadia began: “During the colonial era, many local stories were painted over or removed.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Forgotten Mural, part 1': “There’s an old building in the _____ centre.
rounds.answer: urban
rounds.explanation: The text says: “There’s an old building in the urban centre.

games.title: Unit Mission
games.description: Finish with a mixed challenge across the whole unit.

rounds.prompt: What does 'local' mean?
choices: A large area of land on Earth surrounded by water.
Having a lot of space; not crowded or small.
Related to a specific place or area near you.
Related to the countryside, not the city.
rounds.answer: Related to a specific place or area near you.
rounds.explanation: The local park is where we play every afternoon.

rounds.prompt: What does 'urban' mean?
choices: A large area of land on Earth surrounded by water.
Having a lot of space; not crowded or small.
Related to a city or town.
Related to a time when one country controlled another.
rounds.answer: Related to a city or town.
rounds.explanation: The urban centre had tall buildings and busy streets.

rounds.prompt: What does 'rural' mean?
choices: A large area of land on Earth surrounded by water.
Related to a time when one country controlled another.
Related to events that happened in the past.
Related to the countryside, not the city.
rounds.answer: Related to the countryside, not the city.
rounds.explanation: The rural village was peaceful and surrounded by farms.
